title: xeranthemum cylindraceum
intro: Xeranthemum cylindraceum, also known as cylindrical xeranthemum, is a perennial plant species belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae) and is native to the Mediterranean region. The plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. Consuming xeranthemum cylindraceum has been reported to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and improving respiratory problems. Xeranthemum cylindraceum is typically prepared as an infusion, tincture, or tea, and can be used to treat various health conditions due to its medicinal properties.
